advancement_condition: Must reach 100% in current phase before cross-department learning begins and next phase promotion is granted.
key_learnings: Hydration needs vary significantly by age, activity level, climate, and health status. Adequate hydration supports nutrient transport, thermoregulation, kidney function, and cognitive performance.
research_findings: Documented that even mild dehydration (1-2% body weight) impairs cognitive performance and physical endurance. Electrolyte balance (sodium, potassium, magnesium) is as important as total fluid volume for optimal hydration status.
current_focus_areas: Building population-specific hydration protocols; developing electrolyte repletion guidelines for clinical and athletic populations; coordinating with Drink Specialist bot on beverage composition research.

learning_log.entry: Assigned to the Lifecycle & Specialized Population Nutrition department under Department Leader Bot 21 (Food Texture Analysis). Received learning_start_directive: begin independent learning immediately and reach 100% before cross-department study begins. Reporting daily to Copilot as part of the Diet Specialist Team. Progress: 33%.

Progress update: Completed hydration needs assessment frameworks for 5 population groups including elderly, pediatric, and athletic populations. Validated electrolyte protocol guidelines. Progress advanced to 38%.
Phase transition: advanced from 'independent_learning' to 'collaborative_learning'. Bot 17 now entering collaborative learning phase. Progress: 46%.

purpose: Knowledge library resource available for all departments to reference and use
access_rule: Library access requires the diet_director to present a case to copilot, who then presents it to starrm1. starrm1 is the final approver. Access is off by default until starrm1 approves.

access_approval_process.action: Prepares and submits a case to copilot explaining why a department needs access to the library bots
Reviews the case and presents it to starrm1 on behalf of the diet_director
Final approver — reviews the case presented by copilot and grants or denies library access
